roles.title: Senior Mobile Application Developer
roles.context_line: Service-based company with US, Canadian, and global enterprise clients
bullets: Effectively own development, maintenance, and release management for Svarupa, the company's flagship multilingual scripture platform, after team transitions; the company-wide Team Lead provides high-level oversight.
Owned Phase 1 end-to-end of an enterprise warehouse trailer-analytics platform: login, UI/UX, REST API integration, and barcode/pallet scanning.
Maintain vHUB Inspection (Finloc 2000, Canada) — resolved 18+ production bugs and shipped a Google Places API-powered address-search feature for trailer inspections.
Run multiple concurrent projects across consumer, enterprise, and B2B domains; balance ownership-heavy work with maintenance support depending on the engagement.
Collaborate with senior and lead engineers across mobile delivery; act as technical reviewer on releases and coordinate with backend, QA, and product teams across time zones.

roles.title: Member of Technical Staff (L2)
bullets: Owned mobile development of ZetSIM, the company's flagship consumer eSIM + travel-services product.
Optimized the cart system by improving CRUD operations and reducing API call overhead by 35%, resulting in significantly faster checkout performance.
Implemented multi-currency support across the entire app (plans, packages, cart, checkout) with location-based currency auto-detection — enhancing personalization and conversion.

Delivered end-to-end data roaming functionality via native platform channels (Android/iOS) and resolved critical issues in the ZetCoins loyalty system, enabling real-time alerts and reliable reward redemption.
Supported Android eSIM installation via platform channels, expanding compatibility across major device variants and improving activation rates in key markets.
Mentored two junior developers; collaborated closely with QA and backend teams to resolve high-priority bugs and regressions.
Optimized API integration and state management using flutter_bloc, reducing latency and improving screen-to-screen performance consistency.

roles.title: Mobile Application Developer
roles.context_line: Shipped 6 production Flutter applications across US, UAE/KSA, and education domains
bullets: Lead engineer on SplitEV and SuperConstruct; co-led Falek Tayyeb; solo-built InspireABA.
Acted as SCRUM Master across multiple deliveries (sprint planning, daily standups, Asana coordination); contributed to CI/CD setup and onboarded/trained new team members.
Implemented authentication across products including third-party logins (Google, Facebook, Apple), profile management, and secure session handling.
Owned client interactions and requirements gathering directly with US and UAE/KSA stakeholders.
Cut production crash rate roughly in half on a flagship app via Firebase Crashlytics-driven debugging and targeted refactoring.
